## Summary

## Why

The motivation. Link an issue if there is one (`Closes #...`).

## Changes

- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Stack content
- [ ] Docs

## Testing

How did you validate this works?

```
<commands you ran and their output>
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] `wsp doctor` passes against a scratch workspace using this branch.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Public docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No breaking schema changes (or, if breaking, an ADR is linked above).
